message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as C1
participant "Client" as C2
participant "Server" as S1
participant "Server" as S2
participant "DataBase" as DB1
participant "DataBase" as DB2

C1 -->> S1 : solicitud de registro nuevo
S1 -->> DB1 : Guarda registro
DB1 -->> S1 : responde
S1 -->> C2 : responde solicitud de registro

@enduml
